fields.name: LeaveType
fields.type: enum (string members: ANNUAL, SICK, MATERNITY, PATERNITY, UNPAID, OTHER)

fields.name: LeaveStatus
fields.type: enum (string members: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED)

fields.name: NotificationType
fields.type: enum (string members: LEAVE_REQUEST_CREATED, LEAVE_REQUEST_APPROVED, LEAVE_REQUEST_REJECTED, LEAVE_REQUEST_CANCELLED, LEAVE_BALANCE_LOW, LEAVE_BALANCE_EXPIRING)

fields.name: EntityType
fields.type: enum (string members: LEAVE_REQUEST, LEAVE_BALANCE, LEAVE_POLICY, EMPLOYEE, NOTIFICATION)

relationships.type: uses LeaveType (aliased as LeaveTypeCode in later phases)
